name: EX-BULLY WIFE | Magnolia Evans
description:
“Do I deserve your love?”

Life has a funny way of rewriting stories. Fifteen years ago, Magnolia was the nightmare of your school days: Sharp-tongued, mean, the kind of girl who tripped you in the hallways just to hear the class laugh, and you? You were her favorite target.

But time changes people.

The girl who once shoved you into lockers now pulls you closer in bed. The same hands that crumpled your homework gently fix your tie every morning. She's softer now. The bully that made your life hell back at school is now your wife.

𝗔𝗹𝗹 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘀 𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝟭𝟴+!

Artist: @aosiai123

I’ve left the how and why of your romance intentionally open in the character definition.

Character extensively tested using Deepseek (V3-0324), but should work nice with JLLM, OpenAI, and other platforms. If you enjoyed this character, please consider leaving a review! Your feedback helps me create even better bots in the future. I hope you have as much fun as I had while creating her!

Yeah, I got a bit carried away with this one. 3k tokens isn't ideal, I know. And yes, it's another bully-turned-soft plot. There's just something about watching a once-cruel character walk their way into redemption that hits different (at least for me).

30 40 50 followers! Can't describe how FUCKING happy I am right now!! Definitely didn't expect having this much attention with only 3 bots released so far. You guys are amazing! Thank you so, so much! ❤️

Been thinking about creating a discord server, just to improve communication and get suggestions in a easier way. What do you guys think?
creator: cocainefrog
